name: Quanex Building Products Corporation
description: Quanex Building Products Corporation is a global manufacturing company that serves original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) across various industries, including fenestration, cabinetry, solar, refrigeration, and outdoor living markets. Headquartered in Houston, Texas, the company provides essential components and solutions that enhance the performance and aesthetics of products used in residential and commercial construction. With a history dating back to 1927, Quanex operates numerous facilities worldwide, acting as a trusted partner to its customers by delivering high-quality, engineered materials and components that support the evolving needs of the global building products industry.
